$comment: Copy to config/sources.json (gitignored) and fill in. Tokens come from env vars named by token_env, never inlined here. graphql_url is required; rest_url is optional and defaults from kind+host when omitted. Optional highlight colors (hex #rgb / #rrggbb): a source-level "color", and per-repo by giving a project entry the object form {"path":..., "color":...}. A repo with no color inherits its source's; the UI can override per-repo. Most repos stay bare strings.
